papers.author: Zhihuan Wei, Yang Hu, Xinhang Chen, Yiming Zhang, Jie Liu, Wei Wang

papers.author: Alessio Zaninotto, Bruno Yun, Nir Oren, Srdjan Vesic

papers.author: Yuqi Sun, Tianqin Meng, George Liu, Yashraj Panwar, Lakshya Chaudhry, Munasib Ilham, Aman Chadha

papers.title: Analytica: Soft Propositional Reasoning for Robust and Scalable LLM-Driven Analysis

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are increasingly tasked with complex real-world analysis (e.g., in financial forecasting, scientific discovery), yet their reasoning suffers from stochastic instability and lacks a verifiable, compositional structure.
